prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET (Red Top, 205hp stock) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, Tomei 260° cams, and a Nismo 74mm throttle body for the Y10/Y11 chassis (1996-2005 models). Pair with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU and a Tomei Type-S exhaust manifold for optimized spool and top-end power.

Full bolt-on suspension overhaul using Tein Flex Z coilovers (Y10/Y11-specific valving) with Cusco 22mm front and 20mm rear sway bars. Reinforce the chassis with a Nismo Y10/Y11 strut tower bar and Cusco 4-point front subframe brace to eliminate flex under hard cornering.

Drivetrain upgrades including a Nismo 2-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the QR20DE/QR25DE models (2005+), paired with a Nismo 6-speed manual transmission swap (from the Nissan X-Trail GT) and a Spec Stage 3+ clutch. Use Nismo 550cc injectors and a Walbro 255lph fuel pump for forced-induction reliability.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Y10/Y11-specific) with widened fenders, aggressive front bumper, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Paint in Nissan's original 'Blaze Red' (code: AJ1) with a matte black roof and Nismo side decals for JDM authenticity.

OEM+ interior refresh with a Nismo S-Tune steering wheel, Bride Gias II bucket seats (Y10/Y11-specific mounts), and a custom roll cage wrapped in Alcantara (color-matched to Nissan's 'Charcoal' interior). Replace the stock gauge cluster with a Defi Advance BF series 6-gauge pod (boost, oil temp, water temp, fuel pressure, AFR, and EGT).

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 17x9 +22 front and 17x10 +30 rear (Y10/Y11 fitment) with 225/45/17 and 255/40/17 Falken Azenis RT660 tires. Use Nismo hubcentric spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) for aggressive stance and proper clearance.
